extraction.one_line_summary: HIRSCHI Marc attacked solo miles from the finish on the uphill finale to Sarran, holding off LATOUR Pierre by 47 seconds after earlier breakaway absorbed.
tactical_patterns: HIRSCHI Marc attacked solo multiple kilometers before finish on uphill drag, exploiting GC irrelevance (1h07min down) for freedom.
BENNETT Sam's leadout via MØRKØV Michael consistently wins intermediate sprints over SAGAN Peter, controlling green jersey through intermediate points.
LATOUR Pierre chased alone to finish 2nd, prioritizing time gains from 21st GC position (20min back) over contesting sprint.

rider_signals.HIRSCHI Marc: positive: third top-finish in 12 stages shows consistent threatening presence, finally converted with GC freedom to attack early
rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: negative: crashed early in 218km stage while 3rd overall, panicked team response suggests fragile positioning
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: MØRKØV leadout dominance securing intermediate sprint points reveals systematic green jersey control over SAGAN
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: beaten in intermediate sprint for seventh place, lost two points despite teammate positioning, speed deficit to BENNETT clear
rider_signals.ASGREEN Kasper: negative: struggled visibly in chase based on body language and facial expressions, dropped from breakaway rotation
rider_signals.LATOUR Pierre: positive: chased solo to 47-second deficit, prioritizing time gain opportunities from 21st GC with mountains approaching
